steps.name: Create useExerciseSearch hook
steps.criteria: hook returns suggestions array from ExercisePort.search(); enabled only when query has 2+ chars; returns empty array when query is shorter; unit test mocks ExercisePort and verifies results
steps.implementation_notes: New file src/hooks/useExerciseSearch.ts. Use TanStack Query useQuery with queryKey=['exerciseSearch', trimmed], enabled when trimmed.length >= 2, staleTime: 60_000. Accept exercisePort as optional injected dependency (defaults to new ExerciseRepository(supabaseClient)). Return { suggestions, isLoading, error }. The ExercisePort.search() signature is: search(nameFragment: string): Promise<Exercise[]>.

steps.name: Wire datalist autocomplete in SessionScreen
steps.criteria: exercise input has list attribute pointing to datalist; datalist renders one option per suggestion; typing 2+ chars shows suggestions from useExerciseSearch; unit test verifies datalist is present in DOM
steps.implementation_notes: Import useExerciseSearch. Add const { suggestions } = useExerciseSearch({ query: exerciseName }) inside component. Add list='exercise-suggestions' to the existing #session-exercise input. Add <datalist id='exercise-suggestions'> after the input with suggestions.map to <option value={ex.name} />. No other changes.
